data.title: NBPE announces a transaction in own shares, restricted in certain countries. Not for release in Australia, Canada, Italy, Denmark, Japan, US.
data.description: The data provided in this document should not be disclosed, published, or distributed in Australia, Canada, Italy, Denmark, Japan, the United States, or to any citizens of these regions.

data.title: ABN AMRO appoints Michiel Lap as Chair and nominates Jean-Pierre Mustier to its Supervisory Board.
data.description: ABN AMRO has announced the appointment of Michiel Lap as the Chair of the Supervisory Board. Additionally, the bank has nominated Jean-Pierre Mustier to join the board as a new member. Lap will be leading the board with his extensive experience in the industry. ABN AMRO's decision to bring on Mustier reflects their strategic approach to strengthening the board with diverse talents. The move aims to enhance governance and leadership within the bank. These appointments come as ABN AMRO continues to focus on refining its board composition, with Lap and Mustier poised to play integral roles in driving the bank's strategic direction.

data.title: Endeavour meets guidance with 1,209koz production at ~$1,435/oz AISC for FY-2025 and declares record H2-2025 dividend of $200m amidst >$1bn shareholder returns program.
data.description: Endeavour successfully meets projected targets and announces a historic dividend payment for the second half of 2025. Producing 1,209 thousand ounces in the fiscal year of 2025 at an all-in sustaining cost of approximately $1,435 per ounce. The dividend for the second half of 2025 amounts to $200 million, marking a significant milestone. Furthermore, the company has initiated a shareholder returns program exceeding $1 billion in value.

data.title: Embassy of United Roma Tribes established in The Hague on January 21, 2026, for diplomatic relations.
data.description: In The Hague, Netherlands, on January 21, 2026, the Embassy of the United Roma Tribes was officially founded through a notarial deed, with its headquarters located in The Hague. This Embassy has been set up to facilitate cultural, social, economic, and humanitarian collaboration.

data.title: Swiss bank Sygnum collects more than 750 BTC for market-neutral fund, with 8.9% Q4 returns.
data.description: In the fourth quarter, Sygnum reported that its market-neutral BTC Alpha Fund achieved annualized returns of 8.9%. The fund successfully raised over 750 Bitcoin from a group of professional and institutional investors.

data.title: Skanska and Entra invest NOK 1.8 billion (SEK 1.7 billion) in Oslo office project together.
data.description: A major investment has been made by Skanska in the office project located at Christian Krohgs gate 2 in Oslo, Norway. The total investment for the project amounts to approximately NOK 1.8 billion or SEK 1.7 billion. Skanska will be partnering on this endeavor in a 50/50 joint venture with Entra. The construction contract for this project holds substantial value.

data.title: JDE Peet’s launches plan to promote regenerative agriculture and deforestation-free coffee, aiming at sustainability.
data.description: JDE Peet’s has introduced a Nature Transition Plan aimed at promoting regenerative agriculture and ensuring coffee supply chains are free from deforestation. This initiative underscores the company's commitment to sustainability and environmental conservation. By implementing this plan, JDE Peet's seeks to minimize the environmental impact of its operations while advancing towards more responsible practices. This move comes as part of the company's broader efforts to address climate change and promote eco-friendly strategies. The Nature Transition Plan is designed to enhance the quality and sustainability of coffee production while protecting critical ecosystems.

data.title: Scancell Holdings plc announces financial results for 6 months to Oct 2025: Operating loss reduced to £8.9m, cash balance £8.6m. Positive progress in iSCIB1+ and Modi-1 therapies. Global Phase 3 trial for iSCIB1+ planned for 2026. Finances strengthened post-period with £3m R&D tax credits.
data.description: Scancell Holdings plc, a developer of active immunotherapies for cancer treatment, released unaudited financial results for the six months to October 31, 2025. The DNA ImmunoBody iSCIB1+ saw positive results in a Phase 2 trial for advanced melanoma, showing a 74% Progression Free Survival (PFS) at 16 months with CPIs, which is a 24%-point improvement over standard of care. FDA cleared iSCIB1+ for a Phase 3 trial in advanced melanoma, with plans to start in 2026. The Moditope Modi-1 demonstrated promise in a Phase 2 study for head and neck cancer and renal cell carcinoma, with data readouts expected in H1 2026. Scancell also initiated developability studies for the lead antibody product, SC134. Financially, they reported an operating loss of £8.9 million for this period with a cash balance of £8.6 million. Key milestones include Phase 3 trial commencement in 2026 and data readouts for Modi-1 in H1 2026.CEO Phil L'Huillier highlighted the potential of iSCIB1+ and plans for a global Phase 3 study starting in 2026. They plan to evaluate all financing options for further development, with partnerships being actively discussed. Additionally, developments in the Modi-1 and GlyMab programs were noted. The interim results and full release can be accessed on the Scancell website for more details.

data.title: Pulsar Helium reports financial & operating results for year ending Sep 30, 2025. Raised over $19M through share issuances. Full details on Benzinga.com.
data.description: Pulsar Helium Inc. announced its financial and operational results for the year ended September 30, 2025. They completed a deepening operation for the Jetstream #1 appraisal well, reaching a total depth of 5,100 feet. The Jetstream #1 and Jetstream #2 wells showed sustained average helium concentrations of 8.1% and 5.6% during flow testing. In October 2025, they began a drill program to drill up to ten wells at Topaz. Two U.S. Federal laboratories confirmed helium-3 isotope concentration at the Topaz Project. Financially, they completed fundraising, brokered private placements, and private placements, obtaining gross proceeds of $5,010,985, $2,427,498, and $5,034,846 respectively. Post-year, they issued over 17 million common shares on warrants exercise bringing in C$6,332,394, and over 2 million common shares on options exercise for proceeds of C$990,000. Full story available on Benzinga.com.

Terrorist attacks planned by supporters of an international terrorist organization banned in Russia have been prevented in Dagestan, and two suspects were eliminated during their arrest, the Central Operational Service of the Russian Federal Security Service (FSB) reported.
Indonesia’s bourse plans to verify affiliations for shareholders below 5% stake.

data.title: Increase in XRP millionaire wallets is promising amid market fear. More than 1M tokens held.
data.description: Despite a decrease in overall positive sentiment in the cryptocurrency market, the number of XRP wallets containing over 1 million tokens has been steadily increasing. This rise is particularly noteworthy, especially as a popular cryptocurrency indicator currently shows that the market is mostly driven by fear rather than optimism.
